backup_info.description: Project Columbus - Encrypted Location Sharing Frontend Integration

friend_groups.policy_name: Users can view their own friend groups
Users can create their own friend groups
Users can update their own friend groups
Users can delete their own friend groups

friend_group_members.policy_name: Users can view members of their friend groups
friend_group_members.definition: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.friend_groups fg WHERE fg.id = group_id AND fg.user_id = auth.uid())

friend_group_members.policy_name: Users can add members to their friend groups
friend_group_members.definition: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.friend_groups fg WHERE fg.id = group_id AND fg.user_id = auth.uid())

friend_group_members.policy_name: Users can remove members from their friend groups
friend_group_members.definition: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.friend_groups fg WHERE fg.id = group_id AND fg.user_id = auth.uid())

shared_locations.policy_name: Users can view locations shared with them
Users can view locations they shared
Users can delete locations they shared

user_public_keys.policy_name: Users can view their own public key
Users can view public keys of users they can message
user_public_keys.definition: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.users u WHERE u.id = user_id AND u.id != auth.uid())

user_public_keys.policy_name: Users can create their own public key
Users can update their own public key
Users can delete their own public key

security_features.encryption: End-to-end encryption using P256 ECDH key agreement
security_features.location_fuzzing: Configurable sharing tiers: precise, approximate, city
security_features.expiration: Automatic cleanup of expired shared locations
security_features.access_control: Fine-grained RLS policies for all operations

database_functions.name: get_active_shared_locations_count
database_functions.description: Returns count of active shared locations for a user
